reference: Here, if you have itchy and scaly skin, the application of Mahamarichadi Taila over the affected area would help, according to my opinion. Internally, a combination of Patol Patra Churna, Sariva Churna, Nagermotha Churna, Patha Churna, and Neem Patra Churna combined in the right proportion and given in proper divided doses three times a day is advised.
text: Here, if you have itchy and scaly skin, the application of Mahamara Chettyala over the affected area would help, according to my opinion. Internally, a combination of Patil Patra Churna, Sariva Churna, Nagamotha Churna, Patra Churna, and Nimpatra Churna combined in the right proportion and given in proper divided doses three times a day is advised.
